title: wedelia pseudoyedaea
intro: Wedelia pseudoyedaea, also known as Mexican dandelion or False Daisy, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Wedelia pseudoyedaea include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Wedelia pseudoyedaea can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
